[ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/icici-prudential-mutual-fund/mutual_funds_search/amcid-14.cms) announces discontinuation of subscription in its three international funds with effect from March 2. The three international funds are - ICICI Prudential US Bluechip Equity Fund , ICICI Prudential Nasdaq 100 Index Fund , ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity Fund of Funds.
The fund house informed about this discontinuation to its unitholders through a notice cum addendum.

results.title: Discontinuation of Fresh Subscriptions – ICICI Prudential Mutual FundInsights
excerpts:
Section Title: Discontinuation of Fresh Subscriptions – ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund
Content:
March 11, 2026 . [FundsIndia Desk](https://www.fundsindia.com/blog/author/fundsindiadesk)
[Bulletin](https://www.fundsindia.com/blog/category/bulletin)
**Dear Investors,**
As per the notice issued by **ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund** dated **February 27, 2026** , fresh subscriptions have been discontinued in the following schemes with effect from **March 02, 2026** :
ICICI Prudential US Bluechip Equity Fund
ICICI Prudential Nasdaq 100 Index Fund
ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity Fund of Funds
Accordingly, **lumpsum investments, switch-ins, and new SIP/STP registrations** will not be accepted in these schemes.
However:
**Existing SIP/STP instalments will continue** as per their current registrations.
**Redemptions and switch-outs** from the schemes will **remain unaffected** .

Section Title: ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund Suspends Fresh Subscriptions in 3 International Schemes from March 2...
Content:
Written by: Team Angel One Updated on: 2 Mar 2026, 4:28 pm IST
EN
​
ICICI Prudential to suspend new subscriptions in 3 international funds from March 2 following utilisation of overseas investment headroom.
Section Title: ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund Suspends Fresh Subscriptions in 3 International Schemes from March 2...
Content:
Share [](https://telegram.me/share/url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.angelone.in%2Fnews%2Fmutual-funds%2Ficici-prudential-mutual-fund-suspends-fresh-subscriptions-in-3-international-schemes-from-march-2-2026&text=ICICI%20Prudential%20Mutual%20Fund%20Suspends%20Fresh%20Subscriptions%20in%203%20International%20Schemes%20from%20March%202%2C%202026%20) [](https://api.whatsapp.com/send?text=ICICI%20Prudential%20Mutual%20Fund%20Suspends%20Fresh%20Subscriptions%20in%203%20International%20Schemes%20from%20March%202%2C%202026%20 https%3A%2F%2Fwww.angelone.in%2Fnews%2Fmutual-funds%2Ficici-prudential-mutual-fund-suspends-fresh-subscriptions-in-3-international-schemes-from-march-2-2026)
 ... 
Section Title: ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund Suspends Fresh Subscriptions in 3 International Schemes from March 2...
Content:
[ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company](https://www.angelone.in/mutual-funds/amc/icici-prudential-mutual-funds) has said it will stop accepting fresh investments in 3 of its overseas mutual fund schemes from March 2, 2026.
The restriction will apply to [ICICI Prudential US Bluechip Equity Fund](https://www.angelone.in/mutual-funds/mf-schemes/icici-prudential-us-bluechip-equity-fund-direct-plan-growth) , [ICICI Prudential Nasdaq 100 Index Fund](https://www.angelone.in/mutual-funds/mf-schemes/icici-prudential-nasdaq-100-index-fund-direct-plan-growth) and [ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity Fund of Funds](https://www.angelone.in/mutual-funds/mf-schemes/icici-prudential-strategic-metal-and-energy-equity-fund-of-fund-direct-plan-growth) .
Section Title: ... > **Fresh Subscriptions to Be Paused**
Content:
From the stated date, the fund house will not accept new investments through lump sum purchases, including switches from other schemes into these funds. New registrations under Systematic Investment Plans (SIPs) and Systematic Transfer Plans (STPs) will also not be allowed.
Certain special facilities where these schemes are chosen as target funds will fall under the same restrictions.

Content:
ICICI Prudential AMC
ICICI Prudential AMC to halt new investments in 3 overseas funds
Existing SIPs and SWPs will continue as per scheme rules
Move due to RBI's overseas investment cap being fully utilized
Did our AI summary help?

[](https://www.moneycontrol.com/shorts/business/icici-prudential-mf-to-halt-fresh-inflows-in-three-overseas-schemes-from-march-2 "AI Shorts")
ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company will stop accepting fresh subscriptions in three of its overseas schemes from March 2, 2026, the fund house said in a notice. The move applies to ICICI Prudential US Bluechip Equity Fund, ICICI Prudential Nasdaq 100 Index Fund and ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity Fund of Funds.
Section Title: ICICI Prudential MF to halt fresh inflows in three overseas schemes from March 2
Content:
The asset management company (AMC) had only recently resumed fresh investments in these international schemes in January 2026 after a prolonged pause. The latest decision indicates that the available headroom under the overseas investment limits has once again been fully utilised, prompting the fund house to suspend new inflows.
Story continues below Advertisement
[Remove Ad](https://www.moneycontrol.com/promos/pro.php)
As part of the restrictions, the AMC has discontinued fresh investments through the lump sum route, including switches from other schemes. It has also halted new registrations under Systematic Investment Plans (SIPs), Systematic Transfer Plans (STPs), and certain special facilities where these three schemes are designated as the target schemes.

ICICI Pru MF to stop fresh inflows in 3 overseas funds
ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund will stop accepting fresh subscription in three of its international funds from Monday due to the fear of breaching the limit set by AMFI. The three international funds that will discontinue all types of inflows are ICICI Prudential US Bluechip Equity Fund, ICICI Prudential Nasdaq 100 Index Fund, ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity Fund....
